title: pilosella friesii
intro: Pilosella friesii, also known as the Fries' mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Pilosella friesii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
